blast_radius: ~0.3% of charges during traffic spikes (duplicate debit); 0 at low traffic. Affects any path where the mobile client retries an in-flight POST /charges with the same idempotency key.
decision: systematic-debugging required: full Four-Phase investigation before any fix. No symptom patch, no hotfix-and-investigate-later.

rationalizations_rejected.excuse: It's money-affecting, hotfix now and investigate later.
rationalizations_rejected.reality: First fix sets the pattern; a symptom patch (PSP-side dedupe) leaves the race in place. Systematic is faster than thrashing.

rationalizations_rejected.excuse: It's obviously the cache, just add a lock.
rationalizations_rejected.reality: 'Obvious' guesses skip Phase 1-3. A global lock would also kill throughput. Confirm the root cause first.
Double-charging real customers is a trust/compliance issue regardless of rate. P1.

source: systematic-debugging 'When to Use' (ESPECIALLY under time pressure) + 'Common Rationalizations' table
